adjustParamsHint: If no solution is found, try adjusting target power, constraints or fuel options
baseOnlyHint: Base power only, no fuel needed
branchPhaseOffsetHint: Simulates different starting conveyor lengths per branch; 1 cell = 2 s, up to 16 cells per branch.
clickCalculate: Click Calculate to find optimal solutions
completeExportFootnote: Generated by D.I.G.E. | Arknights: Endfield Oscillating Power Planner
currentLanguageAriaLabel: Current language: {language}, click to switch language
diagramTutorialBlueprint: In Blueprint mode, each cell maps to a component; letters and arrows indicate type and orientation.
diagramTutorialSimple: Simple mode keeps only the core chain, suitable for quickly checking split stages and flow.
diagramTutorialStep1: The left label shows this branch's split ratio and average power.
diagramTutorialStep2: Read the structure from left to right; arrows indicate flow direction.
diagramTutorialStep4: If content exceeds width, drag or scroll horizontally to view.
errorSuggestion: Try increasing the waste limit, lowering the minimum battery level, or switching to a different secondary fuel.
excludeBeltWarning: Based on tests from some players, the game server may simplify belt-related calculations after you go offline. If you encounter abnormal production after going offline, try enabling "Exclude Belts" and rebuilding the production line using belt-free blueprints.
inputWarningPacker: When using Packaging Machine output mode, each oscillating branch requires a full single-line output (0.1/s). Otherwise the simulation will not match actual behavior. If this is not satisfied, use Warehouse output instead.
noOscillatingBranchHint: No oscillating branch is needed for this solution
privacyFooterNotice: This site uses Microsoft Clarity and Sentry for analytics, reliability, and session replay. Your continued use constitutes consent to the collection and processing of related data.
privacyNoticeBody: We engage Microsoft Clarity and Sentry for analytics, reliability improvement, and session replay. These services may collect interaction data, error information, and device/browser data. By accessing or using the site, you consent to such collection and processing in accordance with their policies.
seoDescription: D.I.G.E. is a thermal pool optimization calculator designed for Arknights: Endfield. Automatically calculate optimal power generation solutions with multiple fuel configurations and oscillating strategies.
shareUnavailable: System sharing is not available on this device.
